title: Shanaleshwara Swayambhu Temple
tagline: Shanaleshwara Swayambhu Temple — spiritual town of Punjab

overview.short: Shanaleshwara Swayambhu Temple (Sanskrit: श्री शानालेश्वर स्वयंभू मन्दिर) dedicated to the worship of Lord Shiva.
overview.description: Shanaleshwara Swayambhu Temple (Sanskrit: श्री शानालेश्वर स्वयंभू मन्दिर) dedicated to the worship of Lord Shiva. "Shanaleshwara" means, the sign that is worshiped as Lord Shiva. It is situated at 7 Kilometre away in the Nalas village of Rajpura, Punjab. It is maintained by the ascetic sadhu's of Juna Akhara Foundation.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Rajpura Thermal Power Plant
topPlaces.description: Rajpura Thermal Power Plant is a coal-based thermal power plant located in Nalash village near Rajpura in Patiala district in the Indian state of Punjab. The power plant is operated by the Larsen & Toubro company.

topPlaces.name: Jaswan
topPlaces.description: Jaswan was a chieftaincy in modern-day Himachal Pradesh, India, commanded by the Jaswal Rajput clan. It was founded in 1170 AD by Raja Purab Chand, a cadet of the Katoch lineage, ancient royal family of Kangra.

topPlaces.name: Rajpura
topPlaces.description: Rajpura (Punjabi pronunciation: [ɾədʒpʊɾɑː]) is a city and a municipal council in Patiala district in the Indian state of Punjab, India, situated along the border of the Indian state of Haryana. It is located 26 km from Patiala city, towards East from district headquarter.

topPlaces.name: Bhagana
topPlaces.description: Bhagana is a village in Phagwara in Kapurthala district of Punjab State, India. It is located 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from sub district headquarter and 63 kilometres (39 mi) from district headquarter.

topPlaces.name: Jhansla
topPlaces.description: Jhansla is a village in Punjab, India, near Banur. The Chitkara University, Punjab, the Swami Vivekanand Institute of Engineering and Technology, and the Gian Sagar Institute for Medical Studies are all in Jhansla.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — Rajpura Thermal Power Plant & around

items.note: Rajpura Thermal Power Plant is a coal-based thermal power plant located in Nalash village near Rajpura in Patiala district in the Indian state of Punjab. The power plant is operated by the Larsen & Toubro company.

Jaswan was a chieftaincy in modern-day Himachal Pradesh, India, commanded by the Jaswal Rajput clan. It was founded in 1170 AD by Raja Purab Chand, a cadet of the Katoch lineage, ancient royal family of Kangra.

Rajpura (Punjabi pronunciation: [ɾədʒpʊɾɑː]) is a city and a municipal council in Patiala district in the Indian state of Punjab, India, situated along the border of the Indian state of Haryana. It is located 26 km from Patiala city, towards East from district headquarter.
Bhagana is a village in Phagwara in Kapurthala district of Punjab State, India. It is located 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) from sub district headquarter and 63 kilometres (39 mi) from district headquarter.

Jhansla is a village in Punjab, India, near Banur. The Chitkara University, Punjab, the Swami Vivekanand Institute of Engineering and Technology, and the Gian Sagar Institute for Medical Studies are all in Jhansla.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shanaleshwara Swayambhu Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shanaleshwara Swayambhu Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shanaleshwara Swayambhu Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chandigarh International Airport (25 km) and the nearest railway station is Chandigarh Railway Station (27 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shanaleshwara Swayambhu Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shanaleshwara Swayambhu Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shanaleshwara Swayambhu Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Shanaleshwara Swayambhu Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shanaleshwara Swayambhu Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rajpura Thermal Power Plant, Jaswan, Rajpura, Bhagana, Jhansla.
